transcript: Just got off a call with Rohan Mehta from Zylker Tech, he's the VP Engineering there. They need 60 seats in a managed office, looking at Gurgaon. Budget is around 7000 per seat if we go with that tier.
Woh Priya thi na, Bright Solutions wali, usne bola proposal bhej do, 40 seats chahiye unko Bangalore mein, budget discuss nahi hua abhi.
Quick update, spoke to someone at a fintech startup, forgot the name, they seemed interested but haven't shared seat count or city yet, just a first conversation.
Deal with Ankit from Verve Logistics is closed, we won it, 25 dedicated desks in Pune, contract signed at 8000 per seat.
Yaar unhone mana kar diya, budget issue tha, Nisha ne bataya ki abhi ke liye nahi hoga, Orion Traders ka 20 seats wala deal cancel.
Umm so I talked to a guy, he runs some kind of agency, wants a demo next week, that's about it for now, no seats or location discussed.
Negotiation chal rahi hai Kabir Sharma ke saath, TechNova ke founder hain woh, 100 seats managed office Mumbai mein, pricing pe atke hain, wo 10% discount maang rahe.
Sent the proposal to Meera at Hansen Retail yesterday for their 30-seat requirement in Hyderabad, no word back yet, following up Monday.
So this was just a random inbound, don't even know the company name, someone filled the contact form asking for pricing on a Delhi location, no seat count given.
Call with Arjun Kapoor, CTO at Skyline Foods, they're comparing us with two other coworking chains for a 35-seat private cabin, evaluation phase, no city confirmed yet.
Ravi bola tha ki unka budget 9000 per seat hai, par company ka naam nahi pata mujhe abhi, seats ya city bhi confirm nahi hui, follow up karna hai details ke liye.
Deal is dead, Simran confirmed Larkspur Media went with a competitor, they wanted 20 desks cheaper than our 10,000 per seat quote in Pune.
First conversation with someone from an ed-tech company, exchanged numbers, nothing concrete discussed, no seats or budget mentioned.
Finalize ho gaya sab, Devansh aur uski team ne sign kar diya, Q3 mein move-in karenge, 120 seats managed office Nimbus Cloud ke saath, Gurgaon mein, 7500 per seat pe close hua.
They're still deciding internally, spoke with the ops head, forgot her name, comparing three vendors including us for a 50-seat setup, Redwood Systems is the company, city not yet finalized.
Bas ek missed call tha, call back nahi kiya abhi tak, kuch pata nahi kaun tha ya kitne seats chahiye.
Site visit ho gaya Skyline Foods ka Connaught Place location pe, Arjun ki team ko bahut pasand aaya, 35 seats ka plan hai, decision iss hafte aa jayega.
Talked to the founder of a small D2C brand, really early stage conversation, just gauging interest, no company name, seats, or city mentioned in the call.
Aditi se baat hui, Solstice Interiors ki owner hain, unhone 8 day passes confirm kar diya Mumbai mein, 500 per seat ka monthly package liya hai.
Just following up, no new info, still waiting on Meridian Corp's finance team to approve the 15-seat proposal we sent two weeks back for their Bangalore office.
Unhone reject kar diya humein, said it's too expensive for a startup like theirs, no company name given, bas bola ki small SaaS startup hai, 12 seats chahiye the unko.
Yeh naya lead hai, Naveen Choudhary ne LinkedIn pe message kiya, apna startup mention kiya nahi, bas demo maanga hai koi city ya seat count ke bina.
Scheduled a site visit with Anita from Razorpay for their 40-seat private cabin requirement in Bangalore, Koramangala specifically, no pricing discussed on this call.
